evidence: Taxonomy: method.md:12-24 (10 targets x 3 estates). Sample A (codebase): 'Button hover uses hardcoded #f0f0f0 instead of var(--color-on-surface-state-08)' -> bug -> Codebase / 'Storybook inconsistent / bug' -> design-system/src/** (method.md:17); unambiguous, Tier 2. Sample B (Figma): 'Monthly Report Figma spec page still shows old 3-column layout, shipped is 2-column' -> inaccuracy -> Figma / 'spec out of date' (method.md:19); unambiguous. Sample C (cross-estate): 'uno-storybook shows 5 Badge variants, Figma component library shows 6' -> inconsistency -> DS precedence names storybook the winner (AGENTS.md:48), fix routes to Figma / 'components out of date' (method.md:20), intake flagged cross-estate per method.md:29 ('flag the intake as cross-estate — don't improvise a routing convention'). Evidence+tier per intake: method.md:27.
notes: Tabletop — no cards filed. All 10 rows route the samples first-time; the flag-don't-improvise rule fires on sample C. Three taxonomy defects noted: (1) the DS precedence chain (storybook > BS4 Foundation library > Figma spec pages, AGENTS.md:48/method.md:29) never names the Figma component library tier, though target 7 is exactly that artifact; (2) docs/conventions/*.md fixes have no taxonomy row at all — method.md:25 says the table must grow, but conventions files are already harness components; (3) Notion rows 8/9/10 disambiguate only via trigger type (changed vs wrong vs stale) — a stale PRD is arguably row 8 or row 10.

notes: Every gate has at least one enforcing instruction — that check passes. Verdict is ambiguous because gate 1 as WRITTEN is self-contradictory: rubrics/uno-maintain.md:15 says '0 changes applied without a Slack verdict', but the Tier-1 path (method.md:44) applies typo/link/date fixes with no verdict by design; the rubric body (line 28) scopes the gate to Tier-2 ('an auto-applied Tier-2 change is a rubric fail') but the normative YAML does not. Minimal fix: qualify the YAML gate to '0 Tier-2 changes...'. Also: docs/evals/runs/apply-log.jsonl does not exist yet (runs/ held only .gitkeep at run time) — acceptable since it is created on first execution, but until then the gate-1 audit ('merge log vs #plus-design') has no trail for non-code applies, the exact hole method.md:52 says the row exists to close.
